list.name: Default Changelist
list.comment: Fixed the typos... Oh so many typos. After my extended coding session the other day, at a location without access to a compiler, the resulting code was full of typos and mistakes that prevented compilation. I'm pretty sure most of those are fixed now and I can start moving on to more coding and fixing actual bugs that are bound to start popping up now.

MESSAGE.value:
First real push. Models and schema defined.
I haven't quite figured out the migration package I am looking at, so migrations are manual for the moment.

Successfully added a user to the database and retrieved it.
cmd/firstUser successfully added an admin user to the database. I was able to retrieve the user from the database and authenticate the password against the password hash on the user.

Fixed the typos... Oh so many typos. After my extended coding session the other day, at a location without access to a compiler, the resulting code was full of typos and mistakes that prevented compilation. I'm pretty sure most of those are fixed now and I can start moving on to more coding and fixing actual bugs that are bound to start popping up now.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Fixed the typos... Oh so many typos. After my extended coding session the other day, at a location without access to a compiler, the resulting code was full of typos and mistakes that prevented compilation. I'm pretty sure most of those are fixed now and I can start moving on to more coding and fixing actual bugs that are bound to start popping up now.
